name: Butterfingers Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the corn syrup, sugar, and water to a temperature of 310 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the warmed peanut butter until fully blended.
3. Pour the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet and score into desired pieces.
4. Allow to cool and harden completely.
5. Dip into melted chocolate.
